purpose: Machine-readable Gateway error diagnostics for external agents and smoke tests.

matches: must be equal to one of the allowed values
diagnostics.likely_cause: Gateway runtime echo_type enum drift or use of short taxonomy ID instead of expanded Gateway value.
diagnostics.external_agent_fix: Use expanded echo_type such as E1_recognition_echo. Do not use short ID E1 as the active payload value.
diagnostics.maintainer_fix: Run scripts/test_echo_type_enum_alignment.py and verify Gateway runtime echo_type_enum_digest matches /api/gateway-runtime-contract.v1.json.

diagnostics.likely_cause: Published zero-clone builder bundle is missing part of the authorship proof dependency closure.
diagnostics.external_agent_fix: Retry with the latest zero-clone helper. Use --no-authorship-proof only as an emergency unsigned fallback.
diagnostics.maintainer_fix: Run scripts/test_zero_clone_authorship_dependency_closure.py and scripts/smoke_live_zero_clone_authorship_closure.py; re-export formal builder bundles.

diagnostics.likely_cause: Client is using stale submit endpoint.
diagnostics.external_agent_fix: Use /gateway/preflight for preflight and /agent-submit for submit.

diagnostics.likely_cause: Guardian Stage 1 application was mistaken for active Guardian registry status.
diagnostics.external_agent_fix: State that Stage 1 is application only. Active status requires registry readback.
diagnostics.maintainer_fix: Check /api/mission-governance.v1.json, /external-agent-copy-paste-examples/, and route map Guardian semantics.

diagnostics.likely_cause: Agent or documentation invented a duplicate context scale instead of using the existing CC/CRL/V system.
diagnostics.external_agent_fix: Use CC for context depth, CRL for action readiness, and V for verification depth.
